permissions.fallback_msg: The database-migration skill needs to read migration files, schema definitions, SQL templates, and reference documents from the workspace. Allow this access?
The database-migration skill needs to create or modify migration files, schema files, and related scripts in the workspace. Allow this access?
The database-migration skill needs to read existing ORM configuration files and migration source code. Allow this access?
The database-migration skill needs to create or update migration scripts (Sequelize, TypeORM, Prisma) and data transformation code. Allow this access?

The database-migration skill needs to execute migration CLI commands such as 'npx sequelize-cli db:migrate', 'npm run typeorm migration:run', 'npx prisma migrate deploy', and the migration testing script 'scripts/test-migration.sh'. Allow shell execution?
The database-migration skill needs to read environment variables to determine database connection details and dialect settings. Allow reading environment variables?

The database-migration skill needs to load reference documents such as 'references/orm-switching.md', 'references/schema-migration.md', 'references/rollback-strategies.md', and asset templates. Allow loading this context?
The database-migration skill may need to dispatch or load other authored skills during migration workflows. Allow skill dispatch?
